issue: Difficulty: ❌ EASY - Requires at least HARD for python

agent_report.changes_summary: Hardened repair-flask-signalbox-configs for the Python HARD gate by adding lock_corrections (hold/release), unless_absent and expires_after cascade semantics, stamp-based revoke, and extended route_lock_log rows in seed_evidence.py; updated instruction.md, tests/helpers.py, tests/test_outputs.py, and solution/repair_cartridge.py to match; fixed parse_detail so shorthand when+requires detail parses correctly; bumped Dockerfile to platform-revision 2026-06-30-r12; refreshed submission explanations and rubrics.
